Container.Name: PinchPad
Container.Overview: 🦞 PinchPad©™ is a privacy-first, zero-knowledge self-hostable pearl (note) notebook designed for the Human-Agent ecosystem. Built with a premium maritime aesthetic, it integrates hardware-level SQLCipher (AES-256-CBC) database encryption at-rest, secure client-side GCM note encryption, a dedicated metadata-only SuperAdmin Panel, and autonomous agent rate-limiting through LobsterKeys©™. [br][br]🔒 SQLCipher & GCM Encryption [br]🦞 LobsterKey Agent Handshakes [br]👺 Isolated SuperAdmin Plane [br]🕒 Segregated Chronological Audit Database

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: The default port for the PinchPad Web Interface.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Storage for the encrypted SQLite database and uploaded photos.

Config.Name: DB Encryption Key
Config.Description: Optional key to enable SQLCipher at-rest database encryption. If omitted, the database will be unencrypted.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy
Config.Description: Set to 'true' if running behind a reverse proxy (Nginx, Traefik, etc.) to correctly handle client IPs.

Config.Name: CORS Origin
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated list of allowed origins (e.g., https://pinchpad.yourdomain.com) for restricted API access.

Config.Name: Admin Token
Config.Description: Optional token to enable the SuperAdmin panel at /admin. Generate a secure token (e.g. openssl rand -base64 48). If unset, the admin panel is disabled.

Config.Name: Enable Shell Proxy
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to enable public read-only pearl sharing via ShellProxy.

Config.Name: Shell Proxy Rate Limit
Config.Description: Request limit for public shares per 15 minutes.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Container User ID for file permissions (99 is Unraid default).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Container Group ID for file permissions (100 is Unraid default).

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: The public URL where your PinchPad instance is hosted (e.g., https://notes.yourdomain.com). Required for secure cookie context and HTTPS redirection flows.

Config.Name: Audit Retention Days
Config.Description: Number of days to keep security logs in the segregated audit database before automated cleanup.

Config.Name: Enforce HTTPS
Config.Description: Enforce strict Express-level redirection of all incoming HTTP requests to HTTPS secure ports. Required if public-facing.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: The directory path inside the container where database SQLite stores and assets persist.

Config.Name: Auth Rate Window
Config.Description: Login auth rate window in minutes.

Config.Name: Auth Rate Limit
Config.Description: Max failed auth attempts allowed per window for brute-force prevention.

Config.Name: API Rate Window
Config.Description: Standard API rate limit window in minutes.

Config.Name: API Rate Limit
Config.Description: Standard request threshold allowed per window.

Config.Name: Admin Auth Limit
Config.Description: Strict rate limit for the SuperAdmin admin panel verification endpoint per hour.
